scripts.verify:email-build: rm -rf Research_to_Presentation-dist && APPS_SCRIPT_URL='https://script.google.com/macros/s/verify/exec' node scripts/inject-apps-script-url.mjs && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const h=fs.readFileSync('Research_to_Presentation-dist/index.html','utf8');if(!h.includes('verify/exec'))process.exit(1);"
